name: filter-bar
title: Filter bar
description: A toolbar of filter controls over a collection: a search input, a segmented status toggle, and a multi-select facet dropdown, with a live result-count status and a clear-all action. Baseline is plain markup with real form controls; filter-bar.js debounces input and emits a single normalized filter-change event. A composed recipe — no custom element required to consume it.

cem.name: FilterBar
cem.description: Composed-API surface of the filter-bar preset — a row of filter controls over a collection. Describes the authoring surface (#668), never the internal filter-bar.js wiring. Rides the #653 CEM protocol.

attributes.name: aria-controls
attributes.description: Id of the collection region the bar filters.

slots.description: Filter controls — a search input, segmented toggles, and facet dropdowns.

x-webeverything.note: A composition, not a registered custom element — the CEM coexists with the plain-markup recipe (#652 Fork 1 API-descriptor layer).
